missing = []
pkgs = {
    ''paddleocr'': ''paddleocr'',
    ''torch'': ''torch'',
    ''torchvision'': ''torchvision'', 
    ''transformers'': ''transformers'',
    ''cv2'': ''opencv-python'',
    ''layoutreader'': ''layoutreader'',
}
for imp, pkg in pkgs.items\(\):
    try:
        __import__\(imp\)
    except ImportError:
        missing.append\(pkg\)
print\(''Missing:'', missing\)
")
